ItacPersonItem.Notes: Among the founders of the Ricovrati in 1599, he was `censore sopra le stampe`. Joined the Accademia dei Lincei in 1611. Also member of Crusca, and Accademia Fiorentina. Portrait as Ricovrato is from Istoria.. intorno alle macchie solari (1613).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
